package rulefixtures

// scenario for make_slice_inside_hot_loop_same_shape: make([]T, ...) scratch slices recreated inside loops instead of being reused.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule355NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario355Negative(records []Rule355NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
